prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large purple rubber cylinder
  - obj_1: large green rubber sphere
  - obj_2: large blue rubber cube
  - obj_3: small red metal cube
  - obj_4: large gray rubber cylinder
  - obj_5: small red metal sphere
  - obj_6: large red metal cube
  - obj_7: large gray rubber sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0101] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0102] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0103] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0106] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0107] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0108] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0109] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0110] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0111] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0112] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0113] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0114] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0115] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0116] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0117] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0118] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0119] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0120] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
